name: Hacktivist Swarm / Volunteer DDoS Actors
description: Hacktivist Swarm and Volunteer DDoS Actors are loosely organized groups that coordinate large-scale service disruption campaigns against public-facing targets for political, ideological, retaliatory, or reputational purposes. Unlike advanced persistent threat groups, these actors often prioritize...
strategic_objectives: Disrupt public-facing services for political or ideological
Create reputational damage and visible business disruption
Generate media attention and public pressure against targets
